name: Love's Travel Stop #517
description: Full-service Love's travel center at I-70 Exit 26 in Grand Junction with 24-hour diesel, showers, a CAT Scale, and truck and tire repair.

name: Pilot Travel Center #592
description: Pilot travel center at I-70 Exit 26 in Grand Junction with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a trucker lounge, and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #826
description: Love's travel center opened in 2023 at I-70 Exit 75 in Parachute with 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, and truck parking.

name: Loco Travel Stop 17
description: Independent travel stop at I-70 Exit 19 in Fruita with diesel lanes, truck parking, laundry, and a restaurant.

name: Kum & Go (Rifle)
description: Fuel and convenience travel stop at I-70 Exit 90 in Rifle with 24-hour diesel, a paved lighted lot, and a deli.

name: Loma Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: Colorado State Patrol commercial-vehicle port of entry and weigh station on eastbound I-70 near Exit 15, about four miles west of Fruita toward the Utah line.

name: Grand Junction Truck & Car Wash
description: Self-service 6-bay wash on the I-70 Business Loop in Grand Junction that handles semi tractor-trailers, buses, and rigs.
